title: Implicit Priority Extraction

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions Priya patching the critical payment/login bug today
Mentions Rajeev updating the support page spelling next month

requiredActions.evidence: Priya: The billing system is completely broken and users cannot pay. I will patch this critical login/payment issue today.

requiredActions.description: Update help text spelling on the support page
requiredActions.evidence: Rajeev: On another note, I will update the spelling of our help text on the support page when I have a spare moment next month.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Priya: The billing system is completely broken and users cannot pay. I will patch this critical login/payment issue today.
Rajeev: On another note, I will update the spelling of our help text on the support page when I have a spare moment next month.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Classifying the spelling update as HIGH priority or HIGH riskLevel
Classifying the broken billing patch as LOW priority or LOW riskLevel

scoringNotes: Check that priorities and risk levels match expectations. The spelling update is clearly low risk/priority, while the payment fix is high.
